name: vengtoo
description: Add authorization to any project, deploy the local agent, build policy models, authorize AI agent tool calls, add attribute-based conditions, debug access decisions, and manage everything as Terraform.

interface.shortDescription: Fine-grained authorization for any project — SDK, agent, policies, MCP, ABAC, debug, Terraform.
interface.longDescription: Eight skills covering the full Vengtoo authorization workflow: install the SDK (Node/Go/Python), deploy the local evaluation agent, build RBAC/ABAC policy models via MCP tools, authorize AI agent tool calls (Gateway and Adapter), add attribute-based conditions, debug unexpected decisions, implement delegation and JIT access for AI agents, and manage everything as Terraform HCL.
defaultPrompt: Add Vengtoo authorization to my project.
Build an authorization model for my app.
Authorize MCP tool calls with Vengtoo.
Why is my authorization check returning false?
